creator: kenneth.freidank@gmail.com
text: No.  I installed drm-kmod from a poudriere build in a 12.2 Release jail and a new ports pull.  I built using the 12.2 kernel (remember I kept the old 12.1 kernel in the boot menu).  I un-commented "kld_list=/boot/modules/radeonkms.ko" and the kernel panicked.
